_description: CodeIgniter 4.x DB Query Builder symbol equivalence pack. Extends the stock DbOpRegistry with CodeIgniter 4 query builder method names. CodeIgniter 4 provides a powerful query builder pattern for building SQL queries fluently. Use with --profile=db-aware-codeigniter together with --db-aware to fold CodeIgniter DB call shapes into the same canonical __DB_<OP>__ tokens as the rest of the recognised DB ecosystem. See https://codeigniter.com/
